context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

I wrote a Python script that records some spans and a counter metric, then exits. The script finishes in about half a second. Nothing shows up in Coralogix — no traces, no metrics. What should I check?

checklist.name: no-if-it-only-identifies-one-issue-or-if-it-m
checklist.description: Identifies TWO root causes specific to short-lived scripts: (1) BatchSpanProcessor queues spans and may not flush before the process exits — for scripts use SimpleSpanProcessor which exports synchronously on span.end(); (2) PeriodicExportingMetricReader only exports on its timed interval — a script that exits before the interval fires exports zero metrics; fix by sleeping longer than the export interval or calling force_flush() on the reader before shutdown(). FAIL if it only identifies one issue, or if it does not mention both the span processor and the metric reader export timing problem.
